subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is no God but Him. He succoureth whomsoever He willeth through the hosts of the heavens and of the earth. He, verily, is the One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو ینصر من یشاء بجنود السموات و الارض انه لهو الواحد
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
